description: Login as admin (admin / Admin1234!). Create a Global Role named 'External Auditor' with permissions enabled for 'View project', 'View work packages', 'Add notes', 'View time entries', and 'View wiki', while ensuring 'Edit work packages', 'Log spent time', and 'Delete work packages' are disabled. In the 'E-Commerce Platform' project, update user 'Carol Williams' by removing her 'Developer' role and assigning the 'External Auditor' role.
